notes: Canonical local-booking fallback to hub queue admission.
Local waitlist or lead-time breach routes to durable hub handoff without replacing the booking parent link.
Network preference enters the same durable request and child-lineage model.
Callback re-entry stays a recovery-follow-on lineage instead of a fresh browser-local branch.
Supervisor return keeps the booking parent and records a bounce-back reason on the hub child branch.
